gist.headline: Finding the hive
gist.blurb: We've polished up our search engine presence for the Developer Console. Finding the right API docs and endpoints just got a whole lot easier.
gist.summary: Updated SEO metadata, sitemaps, and robots.txt for the Developer Console to improve search engine visibility.
gist.impact: Developers will have an easier time discovering our API documentation and endpoints directly from search engines.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a guide or explorer, holding a magnifying glass to represent search/SEO, looking at a map or a sign pointing to the Developer Console.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny explorer's hat, holding a magnifying glass up to a glowing lime green (#ecf874) sign that reads 'API DOCS'. A chunky retro computer monitor sits nearby surrounded by small pixelated code-plants. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
